nodes.label:
CannaMax
/ HARK
nodes.desc: The cultivation OS. Drift detection, change feed, real-time pH/EC/flow per zone. Runoff system of record since 2026-05-21 — fed directly by the Run-off Logger via /api/runoff/from-frd over Tailscale Funnel. Postgres on Pi (fluxuum DB).
nodes.tech: TypeScript · Express 5 · Drizzle · Zod · PostgreSQL (Pi) · Tailscale Funnel
nodes.notes: *Idea* -Add a "Copy Infinium to All Room" button to update Environmentals for all 24 rooms all at once

nodes.label:
Facility
Tracker
nodes.desc: Room state dashboard. OCR parsing, env monitoring, change events feed. Pi-hosted. NOTE: runoff capture moved off FT to CannaMax 2026-05-21.
nodes.tech: React 18 · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · Claude Vision · pnpm monorepo

nodes.label:
Recipe
Book
nodes.desc: Grow recipe hub. Cycle tracking, arc charts, drift detection, field notes. Scrapes live controller data.
nodes.tech: Python · Flask · SQLite · WebSocket · OpenAI (optional)

nodes.label: Trellis
nodes.desc: Room builder. Runoff monitoring dashboard. OpenAPI-first codegen. Proprietary + Themes Pack tier.
nodes.tech: React 19 · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · Drizzle · Orval codegen · pnpm monorepo

nodes.label: hark.equipment
nodes.desc: Public marketing site. Gumroad shop live. Grow Journal $18. SSL on Vercel.
nodes.tech: Vercel · SSL · Gumroad

nodes.label:
Fluxuum
Logger
nodes.desc: Irrigation telemetry. pH/EC/flow/gal per zone, 136 reads/hr. Anomaly alerts via Resend email.
nodes.tech: TypeScript · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · React · Resend · OpenAI · pnpm monorepo

nodes.label: Alexandria
nodes.desc: Controller adapter abstraction. ObservationOnlyMarker enforces read-only. Supports Anderson, Infinium, TrolMaster, Argus, and more.
nodes.tech: TypeScript ESM · Zero runtime deps · pnpm monorepo · 5 packages

nodes.label:
Run-off
Logger
nodes.desc: Run-off Logger (a.k.a. FRD / Flower-Room-Display). Vision OCR of runoff log sheets → finalized text. One-click 'SEND TO CANNAMAX' button POSTs to Pi via Tailscale Funnel — no more screenshot+re-upload.
nodes.tech: React 19 · Express 5 · PostgreSQL · Claude Vision · Anthropic SDK

nodes.label:
Flux
Widget
nodes.desc: Home screen widget. Live pH/EC/flow per building. 5-second polling, staleness detection.
nodes.tech: Flutter · Dart · Kotlin · Jetpack Glance · Tailscale

nodes.label:
Incident
Log
nodes.desc: Phone-first incident logger. Used every night shift. jsPDF reports. Pulls Fluxuum sensor context.
nodes.tech: React 18 · Vite · jsPDF · html2canvas · GitHub Pages

nodes.label:
Project
LoRax
nodes.desc: Multi-site cultivation OS. Tailscale primary + LoRa mesh fallback. Consumes Alexandria adapters. 9 packages, 95 tests.
nodes.tech: TypeScript · SQLite · Meshtastic · RAKwireless · Tailscale · Alexandria
nodes.notes: Question: <Ask if my home can be used as a test point if facility isn't ready yet?>

nodes.label:
Project
Panopticon
nodes.desc: Where it started. First Pi monitor. Flask + SQLite + WebSocket. Proved the concept. Everything grew from here.
nodes.tech: Python · Flask · SQLite · Chart.js · systemd · Raspberry Pi 5

nodes.label: Raspberry Pi
nodes.desc: The hub. Hosts Fluxuum:3001, Facility-Tracker:8080, recipe-book:5050. Always-on. Always-watching.
nodes.tech: Pi 5 · 8GB · Pi OS 64-bit · systemd · Tailscale Serve

nodes.label:
Tailscale
Mesh
nodes.desc: Private encrypted mesh. Mac + Pi + Pixel 10. No open ports, no firewall rules. Just works.
nodes.tech: WireGuard · Tailscale Serve · MagicDNS · anderson-hub.tailf0f27a.ts.net

nodes.label: PostgreSQL
nodes.desc: Used by Trellis, Fluxuum, Facility-Tracker, Flower-Room-Display. The heavy-duty store.
nodes.tech: PostgreSQL 16 · Drizzle ORM · drizzle-kit migrations

nodes.label: SQLite
nodes.desc: Used by CannaMax, recipe-book, Panopticon, LoRax. File-based, Pi-friendly, zero config.
nodes.tech: SQLite 3 · better-sqlite3 · Drizzle (CannaMax)

nodes.label:
Dead-man
Switch
nodes.desc: Mac→Pi health monitor. Polls every 5 minutes. Fires ntfy push to phone if Pi goes dark.
nodes.tech: ~/bin/anderson-hub-watcher · launchd · ntfy.sh

nodes.label:
Anderson
Controllers
nodes.desc: AB (10.10.9.254), EF (10.10.13.50), GH (10.10.13.251). WebSocket stream. pH/EC/flow/gal per zone. Source of truth for irrigation.
nodes.tech: HE Anderson · WebSocket ws:// · HTTP login · 24 flower rooms

nodes.label:
Infinium
(Unitronics)
nodes.desc: Lights authority. Temp/RH/CO2/VPD. Trip at 90°F kills lights. Reference only for env — HydroX is ground truth.
nodes.tech: Unitronics PLC · HTTP port 80 · Infinium bridge daemon · launchd

nodes.label:
Sensorex
TX100 pH
nodes.desc: Two redundant TX100 probes per irrigation line. Divergence = sensor flag, never averaged.
nodes.tech: Sensorex TX100 · 2 probes per zone · divergence detection

nodes.label:
Claude API
(Vision)
nodes.desc: OCR for runoff sheets, Infinium screens, shift briefings. Used by Facility-Tracker, Flower-Room-Display, CannaMax.
nodes.tech: claude-opus-4-7 · claude-sonnet-4-6 · @anthropic-ai/sdk

nodes.label: Resend
nodes.desc: Email anomaly alerts from Fluxuum. 30-minute dedup window per zone bucket.
nodes.tech: Resend API · RESEND_API_KEY · 30min dedup

nodes.label:
Fluxuum
Cloud ☠
nodes.desc: fluxuum.replit.app — the old cloud host. Pi mirror is live. Being retired. Kept warm as rollback.
nodes.tech: Replit · retiring → Pi takes over

nodes.label:
HARK
Controller
nodes.desc: The unified cultivation OS. Controller-agnostic, self-serve install, runs on any Pi. Every project in this graph is a feeder. This is what it all becomes.
nodes.tech: Alexandria adapters · LoRax mesh · Trellis UI · Fluxuum telemetry · CannaMax drift engine
nodes.notes: Amazon trajectory — apps are the books, this is the AWS. Built for Founder #1 first. Night operator installs it himself and it just works.
